form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 2nd of 8 at Warrnambool Mdn-Sw on March 9 over 1000m, 1.75 len behind Crickwood carrying 56.5kg at $5.50. Second-up did the work up front then tired 5th of 11 at Echuca Mdn-Sw on March 21 over 1209m, 3 len behind Western Lane carrying 59.5kg at $3.70. Gave a sight last time and expected to take catching.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start 2nd of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1100m, slow going 1.5 len behind Two To Tango with 59.5kg at $18. The start before that 2nd of 13 at Ballarat Mdn-Sw on March 10 over 1200m, 1.0 len behind Manifest The Milli carrying 59.5kg at $7.50. Thereabouts last time out. Long overdue but has had so many chances.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 3rd of 9 at Yarra Valley Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1000m, on a slow track; 2.25 len behind I'm Foxing carrying 59kg at $3.50. Previously second-up 4th of 10 at Murtoa 3yo Mdn-Sw on October 4 over 1100m, 4.5 len behind Wintery carrying 58kg at $6. Fitter for that run and will be tough to beat.

form.formComment: Resuming after six-and-a-half months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign second last of 12 at Benalla Mdn-Sw September 26 over 1206m, 18 len behind Hayatake carrying 57kg at $5.50. When resuming last campaign seventh of 11 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw September 7 over 1100m, in the wet; 6 len behind Poker carrying 57kg at $8. Capable of a bold return.
